Audience is budget-conscious gym beginners.", "summary_for_prompts": "Creator voice: warm, relatable, budget-aware powerlifter. analysis.voice_description: Warm and relatable gym-adjacent student voice — shares genuine milestones and budget hacks without bro-culture posturing.

hook_patterns_that_work.evidence: 42k views, view_index 5.1x account median — top performer by far

hook_patterns_that_work.pattern: Save-worthy resource (weekly meals for broke students)
hook_patterns_that_work.evidence: 31k views, 620 reposts, view_index 3.8x — high repost:view ratio signals utility

winning_themes.theme: Budget meal prep for college students

analysis.posting_cadence: Roughly 1-2 videos per week based on upload dates.
analysis.audience_signal: Engagement rates 8-10% across top posts — highly engaged, primarily saves and reposts over comments. Audience is budget-conscious gym beginners.
analysis.summary_for_prompts: Creator voice: warm, relatable, budget-aware powerlifter. Hooks that outperform (5x+ own median): POV milestone reveals (hitting a PR). Save-worthy resource hooks (3.8x): high-protein meals for broke students with high repost rate. Winning themes: powerlifting milestones, budget meal prep, thrift gym fashion. Audience: highly engaged (8-10% ER), saves-heavy — prefers utility. Cadence: 1-2 per week.

meta.case: creator with 5 enriched videos; top 2 outperform median 5x and 3.8x; structural checks: summary ≤1200 chars, no @handles/URLs, hook/theme arrays within 6-item cap
